title: . Nightwork prohibition. No woman, regardless of age, shall be employed or permitted or suffered to
content:
. Nightwork prohibition. No woman, regardless of age, shall be employed or permitted or suffered to 
work, with or without compensation: 
a. In any industrial undertaking or branch thereof between ten o’clock at night and six o’clock in the 
morning of the following day; or 
   
24 
Downloaded from the Department of Labor and Employment, Republic of the Philippines - 29 September 2011  
http://www.dole.gov.ph/labor_codes.php?id=34 
 
 
b. In any commercial or non-industrial undertaking or branch thereof, other than agricultural, between 
midnight and six o’clock in the morning of the following day; or 
   
c. In any agricultural undertaking at nighttime unless she is given a period of rest of not less than nine 
(9) consecutive hours.
